# 時區轉換器 — timezone.crispy.today

## What this tool does
時區轉換器 is a free online timezone converter and world clock for Traditional Chinese (zh-TW) users, primarily serving Taiwan audiences. It provides real-time time comparison between Taipei and 45+ major cities worldwide.

## Core features
- Real-time world clock with 5 analog clocks (user location, New York, London, Tokyo, Sydney)
- Timezone converter: select any two cities and see instant time difference
- Best calling hours: visual bar showing overlapping awake hours (8AM-10PM)
- Life comparison: side-by-side daily schedule (wake up, lunch, work, sleep)
- DST (Daylight Saving Time) automatic detection and display
- Daily summary with greeting based on current time

## Common questions this tool answers
- What is the time difference between Taipei and [city]?
- What time is it in [city] right now?
- When is the best time to call from Taiwan to [country]?
- Does [country] have daylight saving time?
- How do I adjust to jet lag when traveling from Taiwan?

## Data source
All timezone calculations use the IANA Time Zone Database via the browser's built-in Intl.DateTimeFormat API. Data is always current and automatically handles DST transitions.

## Coverage
45 cities across Asia, Europe, Americas, Oceania, and Africa. All 44 Taipei-to-city pairs have dedicated pages. 20 popular non-Taipei pairs also have dedicated pages. Any valid city combination works via dynamic routing.

## Content
- 65+ city pair pages with FAQ, call hours, life comparison
- 5 travel guide articles (jet lag tips, remote work scheduling, best calling times, DST explained, Taiwan flight routes)
- Homepage FAQ with 7 common timezone questions

## URL structure
- Homepage: https://timezone.crispy.today
- City pair: https://timezone.crispy.today/taipei-paris
- Guide: https://timezone.crispy.today/guide/jet-lag-tips
- Sitemap: https://timezone.crispy.today/sitemap.xml

## Publisher
脆新聞 (Crispy News) — https://crispy.today
